column1: # This manifest lists orthogroup clustering results to be compared.
# Each row points to one completed clustering run's OUTPUT_pipeline directory.
#   run_label              - Short label for this clustering run (used in tables and plots)
#   output_pipeline_path   - Path to the run's OUTPUT_pipeline/ directory (relative to this workflow directory)
#   clustering_method      - Clustering tool used (orthohmm, orthofinder, broccoli)
#   output_pipeline_path should point to the run's OUTPUT_pipeline/ directory:
#   output_pipeline_path should point to the OrthoFinder Results_*/ directory:
#   - Paths are relative to this workflow directory (workflow-COPYME-compare_methods/)
#   - At least 2 clustering runs are required for comparison
#   - Runs can be from the same method (e.g., OrthoHMM with different parameters)
#     or from different methods (e.g., OrthoHMM vs OrthoFinder)
#   - run_label must be unique within the manifest
# 2. Edit clustering_manifest.tsv with your clustering run paths
# HEADER ROW (required, must be exactly these 3 column names)
# EXAMPLE DATA (uncomment and edit with your clustering runs)
# Same method, multiple runs (comparing OrthoHMM parameter sensitivity):
# Cross-method comparison (OrthoFinder path points to Results_* directory):
